client_mentions.name: BAM

summary: The video discusses BAM's digital strategy in construction, using Skipple as a reference case. It highlights how BAM integrates technology using Autodesk products like ACC and Autodesk Platform Services to manage data and automate workflows, creating a consistent digital thread across projects and improving efficiency in processes like IFC exports and user access management.
